steps.title: Identify two points on the line
steps.content: Reading from the graph, the line passes through two clear lattice points: $(-6, -7)$ on the left and $(6, -5)$ on the right.

steps.title: Calculate slope using rise over run
steps.content:
Use the slope formula:
$$\text{slope} = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{-5 - (-7)}{6 - (-6)} = \frac{2}{12} = \frac{1}{6}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
